name: White Perch in Beer Batter
recipeIngredient: 4 White perch, scaled and sprinkled inside and out with lemon juice
recipeInstructions:
The original "best of Denver" Candlelight recipe.
1. In a bowl, mix the flour, cornmeal, dill or tarragon, salt, and paprika until combined.
2. Gradually add the beer to the dry ingredients and beat until smooth.
3. Dip each fish fillet into the beer batter one at a time.
4. Heat the lard in an iron skillet over medium heat.
5. Sauté the fish in batches for 8-9 minutes on each side, or until golden brown and cooked through.
